title: Brazilian Sevaiiya Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir-fry recipe using Brazilian Sevaiiya noodles, chewy texture for added fun.

ingredients.name: chewy
ingredients.notes: any texture with chewy properties, such as dried fruit or nuts

instructions: Cook the Brazilian Sevaiiya noodles according to package instructions.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion, garlic, and bell pepper and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the chewy ingredients and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir in the soy sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
